query: Top 5 outliers in issued construction permits this year

To provide proper attribution for the data used in the analysis.

answer: The top 5 outliers in issued construction permits this year include a commercial remodel permit for a 13,875 sq ft medical office at 4544 S Lamar Blvd with an electrical valuation of $435,660, issued on May 28, 2025. Other specific outliers were not detailed in the provided data. If you need further breakdowns, additional data exploration may be required.
